scripts.docker:build: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && docker build --platform linux/amd64 --target monitor-runner -t reg.kubov.link/ezworkz/monitor:${VERSION} .
scripts.docker:release: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && pnpm docker:build && pnpm docker:push && docker tag reg.kubov.link/ezworkz/monitor:${VERSION} reg.kubov.link/ezworkz/monitor:latest && docker push reg.kubov.link/ezworkz/monitor:latest
